results.rendered_html:
dharā [dharati viśvaṃ dhṛ-ac]
1 The earth; dharā dhārāpātairmaṇimayaśarairbhidyata iva  Mk. 5. 22. 
2 A vein.
3 Marrow.
4 The womb or uterus.
5 A mass of gold or other valuables given as a present to Brāhmaṇas.
Comp.
— adhipaḥ a king.
— amaraḥ, -devaḥ, -suraḥ a Brāhmaṇa.
— ātmajaḥ, -putraḥ, -sūnuḥ
1 epithets of the planet Mars.
2 epithets of the demon Naraka.
(pb)
— ātmajā an epithet of Sītā.
— uddhāraḥ deliverance of the earth.
— dharaḥ
1 a mountain.
2 an epithet of Viṣṇu or Kṛṣṇa.
3 of Śeṣa.
— patiḥ
1 a king.
2 an epithet of Viṣṇu.
— bhuj m. a king.
— bhṛt m. a mountain.
